---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: full
---

# Portfolio Projects

Each project listed below links to a dedicated page with an overview, methodology, and the full report.

::: project-cards
::: project-card
<h3><a href="projects/ada-parc.html">ADA‑PARC Project</a></h3>

<p>A descriptive analysis of quality‑of‑life disparities between disabled and non‑disabled populations across U.S. geographies, paired with an interactive Shiny website and Tableau dashboard.</p>
:::

::: project-card
<h3><a href="projects/mood-disorders.html">Correlates of Mood Disorders</a></h3>

<p>Statistical analysis of CDC survey data identifying modifiable and non‑modifiable predictors of depression and anxiety, with implications for public health policy.</p>
:::

::: project-card
<h3><a href="projects/wic.html">WIC Program Evaluation</a></h3>

<p>A regression discontinuity design evaluation using synthetic data to estimate the causal impact of WIC on infant birth‑weight outcomes.</p>
:::
:::
